history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed after UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 due to missing jakarta.annotation package, unresolved Spring Security 6 symbols (EnableMethodSecurity, Customizer), and Thymeleaf Spring 6 integration issues, indicating the recipe did not fully resolve Jakarta dependency management or Springfox conflicts.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting an explicit jakarta.annotation-api dependency before the Spring Boot 3 upgrade ensures the Jakarta annotation classes are on the classpath, resolving the PostConstruct/Nonnull/Nullable errors. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe will then handle the remaining javax->jakarta migrations, Spring Security 6 updates, and Thymeleaf/Springfox replacements with the correct dependencies already in place.

history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade failed to compile due to missing jakarta.annotation package, unresolved Spring Security 6 symbols, and incompatible springfox dependency.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly remove springfox (incompatible with SB3), add jakarta.annotation-api dependency, and run the SB3 upgrade recipe. The missing jakarta.annotation and Spring Security symbols indicate the meta-recipe did not fully resolve dependencies or namespace migrations, so explicit dependency injection and recipe sequencing will ensure compilation succeeds on JDK 17 before proceeding to JDK 21.

history.qwen_observation: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 recipe migrated javax to jakarta imports but failed to resolve jakarta.annotation-api on the classpath, and missed some Spring Framework 6.1 API changes (Profiles, EnableMethodSecurity).
history.qwen_rationale: Splitting the migration into smaller, verified steps reduces regression risk. We first stabilize on Spring Boot 2.7 under JDK 8, then bump to JDK 17. A pom_patch step explicitly adds jakarta.* APIs to the classpath before the SB 3.3 upgrade, ensuring the recipe's import changes compile. The SB 3.3 meta-recipe then handles the full javax->jakarta and framework migration. Finally, we proceed to JDK 21 with standard plugin and build upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation fails at upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 because org.springframework.core.env.Profiles (added in Spring Framework 5.2) cannot be found, indicating the Spring Framework version is not being updated to 5.3.x alongside the Spring Boot 2.7 parent bump.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding explicit ChangePropertyValue recipes for spring-framework.version, spring.version, and spring-boot.version ensures the classpath resolves to Spring Framework 5.3.x, which contains the Profiles class, allowing the 2.7 upgrade to compile successfully before proceeding to Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
